001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons.customnumber;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.message.argument.SingleArgument;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.RefreshableButton;
006import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
007import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.session.CustomNumberHolder;
008import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
009import org.bukkit.Material;
010import org.bukkit.Sound;
011import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
012import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
013import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
014import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
015import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
016
017import java.util.ArrayList;
018
019@SuppressWarnings("ClassCanBeRecord")
020public class DecreaseCustomNumberButton implements RefreshableButton {
021
022    private final CustomNumberHolder holder;
023    private final Component displayName;
024    private final SingleArgument<Integer> clickToDecreaseLore;
025    private final SingleArgument<Integer> currentAmountLore;
026    private final int slot;
027    private final Menu menuToUpdate;
028
029    public DecreaseCustomNumberButton(@NotNull CustomNumberHolder holder, @NotNull Component displayName,
030                                      @NotNull SingleArgument<Integer> clickToDecreaseLore,
031                                      @NotNull SingleArgument<Integer> currentAmountLore,
032                                      int slot, @Nullable Menu menuToUpdate) {
033        this.holder = holder;
034        this.displayName = displayName;
035        this.clickToDecreaseLore = clickToDecreaseLore;
036        this.currentAmountLore = currentAmountLore;
037        this.slot = slot;
038        this.menuToUpdate = menuToUpdate;
039    }
040
041    @Override
042    public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
043        return Material.RED_STAINED_GLASS_PANE;
044    }
045
046    @Override
047    public int getIconAmount() {
048        return 1;
049    }
050
051    @Override
052    public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
053        target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(displayName, viewer));
054
055        var lore = new ArrayList<Component>();
056
057        var unit = holder.getUnit().getAmount();
058        var currentAmount = holder.getAmount();
059
060        lore.add(Component.empty());
061
062        lore.add(clickToDecreaseLore.apply(unit));
063
064
065        lore.add(Component.empty());
066
067        lore.add(currentAmountLore.apply(currentAmount));
068
069        target.lore(TranslationUtil.render(lore, viewer));
070
071        return target;
072    }
073
074    @Override
075    public int getSlot() {
076        return slot;
077    }
078
079    @Override
080    public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
081        var current = holder.getAmount();
082
083        if (1 < current) {
084            holder.decreaseAmount();
085        } else {
086            return;
087        }
088
089        clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.BLOCK_WOODEN_BUTTON_CLICK_OFF, 100f, 1.5f);
090
091        if (menuToUpdate != null) {
092            menuToUpdate.updateMenu(clicker);
093        }
094    }
095}
